content.en:
Lord of the Holy Peak spoke as a representative.

"This time, the Void Beast side has sent a large number of Void Beasts, but they are still under our control, and it is still possible to defeat them with the power of the Lord Alliance. Moreover, by killing these Voidmon, we can also get more Voidmon materials, which is enough to make up for the loss. Now it's time to discuss the encirclement and suppression plan, and try to kill a few fifth-order void beasts. "

After the Holy Peak Lord finished speaking, the Void Sword Lord asked, "Lord Holy Peak, the strength of the fifth-order Void Beast is comparable to that of the Legendary Lord, and the life-saving ability is very strong, do the six guild leaders have a way to kill them?"

"Of course there is!"

The Holy Peak Lord said confidently.

Then, the Holy Peak Lord said: "I know that many of your lords are secretly studying the Void Beast, but after all, your strength has not reached the level of the Legendary Lord, and the research on the Void Beast is not very thorough, and our six major leaders have studied a huge effect of the Void Beast, we can announce it, and even spread it throughout the space-time territory." Once the word spreads, I am afraid that many people who don't want to participate in the war will take action. "

Although the Lord Alliance has most of the Eternal Realm of the space-time territory, there are still some Eternal Realms that have not joined the Lord Alliance, although they can't enjoy some of the power and benefits of the Lord Alliance, but people don't care.

Therefore, this time, the six presidents could not force 817 them.

But once the benefits of the Void Beasts were revealed, it would be enough to attract them.

In this way, the encirclement and suppression plan can be better carried out, so that many Void Beasts will not be able to escape.

At this time, the Phoenix Lord asked urgently: "Lord Saint Peak, we only know that the Void Beast Heart Core helps us temper our will, the Void Beast Worm bones and fur can refine the Void Saint Soldier, and the Void Saint Soldier hurts the Void Beast Worm effect, what other uses is it?"

The other lords were also curious, waiting for the announcement of the Holy Peak Lord.

The Holy Peak Lord did not continue to conceal it, and said: "The Void Beast is a very special species, they don't seem to have any eternal rules, but their attack power can easily shatter and melt the innate eternal rules, and they also have the ability to void, this ability is the highest use of the Void Eternal Rules. In addition, we have found that Voidbeasts absolutely have wills, but they cannot sense their wills, so it is likely that they are perfectly fused with their innate wills and bodies, and every particle in their bodies is will. Because of this, it is also very difficult for our will attacks to cause damage to them. If the Immortal Realm wants to impact the Immortal Realm, it needs the body and will to be compatible, the kind that is perfectly integrated. Fusing a little bit is a half-step immortal realm, and fusing more than one percent can break the boundary and enter the immortal realm. If it is 100% fused, it can impact the Legendary Lord realm. And we have found a way to improve the integration of the will and body, which is the result of your dream research. And the medium of this research is the Void Beast, if we publish the results of this study, do you think there are still lords who will not kill the Void Beast?"

The Phoenix Lord, the Void Sword Lord, and other Immortal Realm Lords were shocked.

They had indeed studied it secretly, but it was difficult to have any results, the Phoenix Lord was the most deeply researched Immortal Realm Lord, but they still hadn't studied it, and the six presidents had studied it.

"Six Presidents, are you really willing to announce it?"

The Phoenix Lord was a little incredulous.

If he had researched it, he would never have said it.

Lord Liuyang affirmed: "Naturally, we are willing to announce it, mainly because this secret is of little use to us, and once it is announced, it is likely that a seventh Legendary Lord will be created." There are many legendary lords, and our space-time territory and the source sea are safe. From this invasion of the Void Beasts, we can guess that there are more than seven fifth-order Void Beasts in the depths of the Void Beasts, and once a large number of fifth-order Void Beasts invade, we can't stop it. That's why we're willing to announce it to improve the strength of the space-time territory. Otherwise, we wouldn't be so selfless. "

"Thank you, six presidents!"

Many Immortal Realm Lords thanked.

In fact, for the six presidents, one more president or a few more presidents will not have much impact on them, they want to be eternal and stable, and they will be in charge of the space-time territory for countless eternal years, and they will not be threatened, that is what they are looking forward to.

But this time, the Voidmon was a bit of a threat to their stability, so they chose to reveal the true value of the Voidmon.

Of course.

They also needed a large number of Eternal Realms to pull the other Void Beasts for them, allowing them to concentrate on dealing with those seven fifth-order Void Beasts.

Soon.

The meeting was over, and nearly a hundred Immortal Realm Lords were ready to fully assist the Six Great Leaders, helping them divide the battlefield, and stop those Void Beasts from rescuing the seven fifth-order Void Beasts at a critical moment.

And not long after, the use value of the Void Beast was also publicized by the six presidents, and a large number of Eternal Realms knew about this secret, even the Eight Pole Tower.

Bajilou knew, and Ye Tian naturally knew it for the first time.

------------，---------

"The Void Beast can actually improve its will, and it can also cause the will to merge with its body and step into the immortal realm!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It's no wonder that the Phoenix Leader mainly studies the Void Beast, this value is too high.

Moreover, this secret was announced by the six presidents of the highest status of the Lordship Alliance, so the credibility is naturally very high.

"I'm still worried that it will be difficult to improve my will in the future, but the Void Beast can help me improve my will, but I can't kill a Void Beast now!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

The strength of the Void Beasts is comparable to that of the Eternal Realm Lords, and it is very difficult to hurt them.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian thought of one thing, that is, although the Void Immortal Ancestral Fu was very powerful, the Void Beast did not have a deep study of the Void Immortal Ancestral Endowment, and only relied on its instinct and its own race characteristics to exert the Void Transformation Ability.

However, he has the Legendary Ancestral Endowment Level Immortal Eternal Skill, although it is difficult to create a Legendary Eternal Technique related to the Void Talent, but it is not difficult to create a Void Talent and develop an Offensive Ordinary Eternal Technique for the Void Talent.

Once he created such an eternal technique, he could inflict a certain amount of damage on the Void Beast, and then combined with the Eight Extremes Tower's many Eight Extremes Realm, he had a certain hope of encircling and killing a first-order Void Beast.

"Create such an eternal technique as fast as possible!"

Ye Tian began to speed up the time to comprehend and create, and the Lord Alliance's real general attack on the Void Beast would not be carried out so quickly, so there was still a lot of time left for Ye Tianyi.

Ye Tianyi's Void Talent Level was too high, so it was very fast to create an ordinary Immortal Technique.

It didn't take long for an eternal technique to be created.

This eternal technique was named the Cave Void Secret Sword by Ye Tian, which means the ability to penetrate the void.

Once this eternal technique is cast, it can form an almost illusory small sword, which can hurt the void beast in the ethereal state. _
